race.comment: ENGINE OF WAR (13) just over a month between runs when he flashed late to finish a narrow third over 2000m at Randwick in BM72 grade with the 59kg. Held in high regard by the yard and will take stopping with Roper's 2kg claim. Can race closer and score a long overdue win. NASEBAH (12) gives the indication she's looking for this trip and further now after she took an eternity to wind up when fourth over 1800m at Randwick. Has the upside to overcome the wide draw fourth-up with just the 54.5kg. Go close. GOLDEN CENTURY (3) slashing run first-up, then drifted back and never threatened when a dismal eleventh over 1800m at this track. Bubble checker goes on and no shock to see him make rapid improvement. LENNOX (11) bumped into some handy types over the staying trips last prep and looks ready to peak third-up. Can hold a forward position with the big weight drop and stays in the mix. MO CHROI (5) lightly raced imported French gelding who won well over 1500m at Canterbury first-up. Respect.
